ogTitle: Hamelin Bay vs Hamelin Pool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hamelin Bay and Hamelin Pool.
heading: Hamelin Bay vs Hamelin Pool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hamelin Bay, Western Australia and Hamelin Pool, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hamelin Pool has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Hamelin Bay (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hamelin Bay or Hamelin Pool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hamelin Bay has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Hamelin Pool scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hamelin Bay scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Hamelin Pool scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hamelin Bay or Hamelin Pool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hamelin Pool has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
